isolation.notes: Used dedicated browser session and assertion-specific failed-login requests; no seed account mutations performed.

assertions.title: Invalid password shows error; no session cookie on failed auth

steps.action: Open /login and submit username=admin with wrong password
steps.expected: Generic auth error shown and URL remains /login
steps.observed: Login page stayed at http://localhost:3101/login and displayed 'Invalid username or password'

steps.action: POST /api/auth/login via curl with wrong password
steps.observed: HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized and no Set-Cookie header present

evidence.network: Browser POST /api/auth/login observed (foundation-auth/auth-cookie-failures/VAL-AUTH-003-network.txt); URL stayed /login (foundation-auth/auth-cookie-failures/VAL-AUTH-003-url.txt); curl 401 + generic error body and no Set-Cookie (foundation-auth/auth-cookie-failures/VAL-AUTH-003-curl-response.txt, foundation-auth/auth-cookie-failures/VAL-AUTH-003-curl-header-check.txt).

assertions.title: Non-existent username shows generic error; no session cookie on failed auth

steps.action: Open /login and submit unknown username with wrong password
steps.expected: Generic auth error shown and URL remains /login
steps.observed: Login page stayed at http://localhost:3101/login and displayed 'Invalid username or password'

steps.action: POST /api/auth/login via curl with unknown username
steps.expected: 401 response with same generic error and no Set-Cookie header
steps.observed: HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized with body {"error":"Invalid username or password"} and no Set-Cookie header

evidence.network: Browser POST /api/auth/login observed (foundation-auth/auth-cookie-failures/VAL-AUTH-004-network.txt); URL stayed /login (foundation-auth/auth-cookie-failures/VAL-AUTH-004-url.txt); curl 401 + generic error body and no Set-Cookie (foundation-auth/auth-cookie-failures/VAL-AUTH-004-curl-response.txt, foundation-auth/auth-cookie-failures/VAL-AUTH-004-curl-header-check.txt).

frictions.description: agent-browser network output lists matching requests but omits response status/header/body details needed for cookie assertions.
frictions.resolution: Captured definitive 401 headers and payloads using curl for each assertion.

summary: Tested 2 assertions (VAL-AUTH-003, VAL-AUTH-004): both passed. UI showed the generic login failure message and curl-confirmed 401 responses excluded Set-Cookie headers in both failure paths.
